doc_title_en: Progress on Measures for Realizing Cost-of-Capital and Stock-Price-Aware Management, and Future Initiatives
doc_title_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現に向けた対応の進捗並びに今後の取組みについて

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営

summary_en: Progress update on cost-of-capital and stock-price-aware management framework initially disclosed May 2024. New medium-term plan (Dream Action 2030, FY3/30 horizon) published May 2024. Framework revised following updated analysis. Specific targets and metrics not disclosed in this summary document.
summary_jp: 2024年5月開示の資本コスト・株価意識経営の進捗更新。新中期経営計画「Dream Action 2030」（FY3/30終了）に基づき、現状分析を踏まえた取組み内容を更新。詳細な数値目標は別紙資料に記載。
tag_en: COC Update – Cost of Capital & Stock Price Awareness – Progress Report & FY3/30 Targets
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 – 進捗並びにFY3/30向け取組み更新
